author: Maksimilians Aleksandrovics
name: JEPA EMA Teacher + MLP3x + 10L
blurb: Non-record submission implementing JEPA (Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture) as an auxiliary training objective. An EMA teacher provides stable latent targets; a linear predictor maps student hidden states toward teacher space via cosine loss (alpha=0.3, CE-dominant throughout). Teacher is discarded before serialization — zero byte cost. 10 layers, MLP 3x, 512 dim, 1024 vocab, tied embeddings, int8+zlib.
